props.message:
THE KHORGAUL ROOST

A burned-out hilltop hold. Charred furniture. Wind through broken stone. Some things are still warm to the touch — though no fire has been laid here for years.

The Drawing-In started somewhere. It might have started here.

Scorched stone marker:

'The Roost burned in a season nobody wrote down. The wind takes the ash a little further every year. By the time you read this it may already be gone.'
Charred floorboards. A handful of black feathers in a corner. The smell is faint but familiar — old smoke, and something underneath it that doesn't have a clean name.

root.speaker: Cultist Drev
root.text:
*he is sweeping ash, slowly. The broom is older than he is. He looks up with the friendliness of a man who has not had visitors in a long while.*

Welcome, friend. Welcome to the Roost. The Master is away on long business — but he'll be back, oh yes. He'll be back any day now.

choices.label: How long ago did the Roost burn?
When did you last see your master?

burn.speaker: Cultist Drev
burn.text:
Burn? *he looks confused.*

There was — there was a season of bad lightning, perhaps. The roof needs work. The Master will see to it when he returns.

*the wind moves a piece of burnt cloth across the floor. He doesn't seem to notice it.*

last.speaker: Cultist Drev
last.text:
Last? Oh, not long. Not long at all. I keep his rooms in order. He'll be back in the next breath, or the breath after, or the one after that.

Walker — would you like a cup of something? I have... I had... let me see what we have.

*he doesn't move.*

bye.speaker: Cultist Drev
bye.text: Walk well. Tell the Master, if you see him on the road, that the Roost is kept. The Roost is kept.
